rationale: Review 1's Is- prefix renames (to IsAffineAlgGroup/IsReductiveGroup/IsSemisimpleGroup) and unipotent_radical_trivial:True naming fixes are real inconsistencies directly visible in the diff (cf. existing IsUnipotent + the Mathlib examples cited) that a maintainer would want fixed for consistency/accuracy; acting on them produces a better PR than Review 2's approve, which leaves them untouched. No other findings matter.
